mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN_APPLICATION (APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME, ADDRESS, DEL_YN) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{customerId}, #{amount}, #{statusCode}, #{fileName}, #{address}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME, ADDRESS, DEL_YN, APPLIED_AT FROM LOAN_APPLICATION WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC
SELECT APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME, ADDRESS, DEL_YN, APPLIED_AT FROM LOAN_APPLICATION WHERE APPLICATION_ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME, ADDRESS, DEL_YN, APPLIED_AT FROM LOAN_APPLICATION
DEL_YN = 'N' AND CUSTOMER_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') AND STATUS_CODE = #{status} AND APPLIED_AT >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND APPLIED_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC
SELECT APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME, ADDRESS, DEL_YN, APPLIED_AT FROM LOAN_APPLICATION WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOAN_APPLICATION WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, AMOUNT, STATUS FROM LOAN_APPLICATION ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC
